name: universal-broker-sdk
description: A universal message broker kit for Node.js (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc)

scripts.version-bump: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const pkgsDir = 'packages'; const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')); const parts = pkg.version.split('.'); parts[2] = parseInt(parts[2]) + 1; const newVersion = parts.join('.'); function updateFile(filePath) { if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return; const p = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8')); p.version = newVersion; ['dependencies', 'devDependencies', 'peerDependencies', 'optionalDependencies'].forEach(type => { if (p[type]) { Object.keys(p[type]).forEach(dep => { if (dep.startsWith('@universal-broker/')) p[type][dep] = '^' + newVersion; }); } }); fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n'); } updateFile('package.json'); fs.readdirSync(pkgsDir).forEach(f => updateFile(path.join(pkgsDir, f, 'package.json'))); console.log('Bumped to ' + newVersion);"
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspaces --access public

author: yadavmandeep
